steps: Go to https://dashboard.pusher.com/accounts/sign_up and create a free account
Verify your email and log in to the Pusher dashboard
Click 'Channels' in the left sidebar to access the Channels product
Click 'Create app' (or 'Your apps' > 'Create a new app')
Enter a name for your app and select a cluster closest to your users (e.g., us2, eu, ap1)
Optionally select your frontend and backend tech stack for starter code
In your app, click 'App Keys' in the left sidebar
Copy the app_id, key, secret, and cluster values

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: App Key
credential_fields.description: Your Pusher Channels app key (the 'key' value from App Keys, not the app_id)

notes: Pusher requires four values: app_id, key, secret, and cluster — all found under App Keys
The 'key' is the public identifier; the 'secret' is confidential and used to sign requests
Free Sandbox plan: 200,000 messages/day, 100 max connections
The cluster (e.g., us2, eu, ap1) determines the API base URL: api-{cluster}.pusher.com
The legacy base URL api.pusherapp.com also works for requests
Server-side authentication for private/presence channels requires the secret to sign auth responses

test_endpoint.description: List active channels for the app (requires HMAC signature authentication)
